name: Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Mix the dry ingredients in a bowl.
3. Add the oil and mix.
4. Add the juice (plus remaining ingredients, if desired).
5. If the dough seems too dry, add more juice.
6. Drop by the teaspoonful onto a greased cookie sheet and flatten slightly.
7. Bake until golden brown, about 15-20 minutes.
VARIATIONS:
Make the cookies without wheat flour for those allergic. Use oat flour and add 1 tablespoon arrowroot flour or powder.
Use pineapple juice instead of apple for sweeter cookies.
To use leftover oatmeal, use 1 cup juice and 2 tablespoons honey or other sweetener.
